title: Training Plan Setup
subtitle: Customize your workout recommendations
primaryGoal: What is your primary training goal?
howReceivePlan: How do you want to receive your training plan?
dailyRecommendationsDesc: Get a personalized workout recommendation each day
periodizationModelDesc: How intensity is distributed across your plan, with progressive overload and recovery (deload) weeks.
periodization_Auto_desc: Chosen automatically from your goal and level.
periodization_Polarized_desc: Mostly easy riding with a few hard sessions (~80/20).
periodization_Pyramidal_desc: Large endurance base with moderate intensity.
mesocycleDesc: How many weeks before a recovery (deload) week. Build weeks progress (a bit longer / one more interval), then the last week eases off for super-compensation.
restDaysDesc: Pick the days you want off. Leave empty to let the planner choose. A genuinely hard session is followed by rest, while an easy Z2 spin can sit next to a hard day.
longRideDesc: Concentrate your weekly endurance into one longer ride (Z2 works best as a single long ride) instead of spreading it across several days.
maxLongRide: Longest ride you can do: {{hours}} h
weekStartDayDesc: The day your training week starts on. Affects the weekly and full plan as well as the completed-week view.
suggestNonCyclingDesc: When highly fatigued, suggest a walk or complete rest instead of a ride
